cli_command.family_disambiguator: codex exec (stdin role=user; orchestrator-prompt delivered via -c model_instructions_file)

system_prompt_delivery_mode.notes: LOAD-BEARING per constraints/cross-family-codex-stdin-role-user.md. Stdin assigns role=user — silent severity-loss bug if orchestrator-prompt is inlined there. Family arm MUST append this flag and MUST NOT inline the orchestrator-prompt as stdin/prompt-argument.

mcp_registration_file_path.notes: TOML [[mcp_servers]] blocks bracketed by # CAA-CODEX-MCP:begin / # CAA-CODEX-MCP:end markers for idempotent re-runs. install-codex-hooks.sh also installs the hook shims (S12); a future bin/install-codex-mcp.sh OR a --mcp flag on the existing installer registers the context-tools MCP server. Launcher invokes the install script idempotently at pre_spawn_hook time.

agent_registry_mode.notes: Codex has no in-process Agent-tool dispatch; the orchestrator dispatches via the dispatch_agent MCP tool. Agent descriptions are inlined into the orchestrator-prompt during Phase 1 prompt-neutralization OR via a render-time directive in orchestrator_prompt_render. Q-15 hallucination risk mitigated by JSON Schema enum on dispatch_agent.subagent_type (Decision-1 of parity analysis).

token_measurement_mechanism.parse_strategy: tail-poll rollout.jsonl; sum token_count events (codex-rs/core/src/rollout/recorder.rs schema); also accepts --json turn.completed.usage when --json mode is on

auth_lifecycle.notes: Production codex deployments use API-key auth (per parity analysis Phase 3 design note). pre_launch_check verifies OPENAI_API_KEY is set and probes a single trivial codex exec to confirm reachability before worktree creation.
